name: AllContributorsConfig
description: Schema for the .all-contributorsrc configuration file used by the All Contributors specification and bot to manage open-source project contributor attribution.

projectOwner.description: GitHub username or organization that owns the project.

repoHost.description: Hostname of the repository hosting service.

files.description: List of files to update with contributor tables.

imageSize.description: Size in pixels for contributor avatar images.

commit.description: Whether to automatically commit changes when contributors are added.

contributorsPerLine.description: Maximum number of contributors to display per line in the table.

contributors.description: List of contributors to the project.

Contributor.name: Contributor
Contributor.description: An individual contributor to the project with their profile information and contribution types.

name.description: Full display name of the contributor.

avatar_url.description: URL to the contributor's avatar image.

profile.description: URL to the contributor's public profile page.

contributions.description: List of contribution types made by this contributor.

AuthorEntry.name: AuthorEntry
AuthorEntry.description: A structured entry representing an author or contributor in an AUTHORS.md file.

url.description: Personal website or profile URL of the author.

contributions.description: Description of which files or portions of the project the author contributed.

organization.description: Organization or employer affiliation of the author.

role.description: Role of the author in the project.
